name: status
description: Sapphire status dashboard and self-awareness tool
author: Sapphire

app.label: Sapphire Status
app.description: Live system stats, diagnostics, and service health

settings.label: Custom status commands
settings.placeholder:
Linux examples:
CPU temp ::: /usr/bin/sensors | grep Package
GPU ::: nvidia-smi --query-gpu=name,temperature.gpu --format=csv,noheader
Uptime ::: uptime
# Windows examples:
GPU ::: nvidia-smi --query-gpu=name,temperature.gpu --format=csv,noheader
Uptime ::: powershell -c "(Get-Uptime).ToString()"
# Lines starting with # are skipped
settings.help: One per line: LABEL ::: COMMAND. Output is shown to the AI when it calls get_self_info. Pipes/redirects work (shell=True) — to FILTER lines, pipe through grep (e.g. ` | grep Package`), not just `| Package`. 5s timeout, 500-char output cap, sudo refused. Lines starting with # are skipped.
